SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

U. D. CASE. JUDGE WILLIS HANNAWALT, RPT. B. FIELDS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS 2PM C/C FOR SETTL. CONF. JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATON. ALL PRESENT. ATTY. FOR PLTF. THEODORE H. LONG ATTY. FOR DEFT. IN PRO PER PLTF. HAVE JUDGMNT. FOR POSSESSION OF 2661 CALIFORNIA ST, UNIT #2. COMPLETE SETTLMNT. PLTF. SHAL PAY DEFT. $1,500.00. FOR DEPOSIT ON FIRST MOS. RENT OR TO DEFT. ON SURR. OF PROP. BEFORE 9/15/94 AT 5PM. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH BUT EVICTION STAYED TIL 9/15/94 AT 5PM. IF DEFT. DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY HE WILL NOT BE PAID AND SHERIFF SHALL PROCEED TO EVICT. IF DEFT. VACATES TIMELY SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SHALL BE FILED.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOEY, OWEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2661 CALIFORNIA ST, APT.2, STAYED UNTIL SEP-09-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGEMENT.
